summary: Squad Lead sq-019 successfully launched 5 premium leaf workers across Claude Opus (4.7, 4.6, 4.5) and GPT (5.5, 5.4) models for comprehensive collaboration bus QA audit. All workers completed their assigned review areas (end-to-end flow, proposal events, review/improvement events, consensus/broadcast events, cross-event integration). Synthesis identifies collaboration bus as functional but critically underspecified — operational in live runs but lacking validation, documentation, and consistency. 10 critical findings, 8 adoption blockers ranked, 10 recommended actions. Overall confidence: 0.83.
